description: Matches spell-level Vermyth intent from Axiomurgy /arcane/recommend for the inbox triage example: scope axiomurgy:inbox_triage, high side-effect tolerance, irreversible writes under high/critical risk.
recommended_for: Spells whose recommendation probe uses the default Axiomurgy spell_level_vermyth_intent mapping
Human-in-the-loop outbound flows modeled in examples/inbox_triage.spell.json

recommendation.why_better: Bundled decide template aligns with Axiomurgy-derived intent for the packaged inbox triage spell (scope + tolerance + reversibility from spell graph and risk).

intent.objective: Axiomurgy inbox triage (read, classify, approve, archive)
